channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-03-09 01:24 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: The lunatic left that took over Twitter was Wormtongue to the World. Firing@Jackwas the final straw....
item.description: The lunatic left that took over Twitter was Wormtongue to the World. Firing@Jackwas the final straw. He was the last bulwark. Now Bret Taylor is chair of@OpenAI…

item.title: @elonmusk: MUST-SEE: President of El Salvador Nayib Bukele - "What about the human right of the women who don't...
item.description: MUST-SEE: President of El Salvador Nayib Bukele - "What about the human right of the women who don't want to be r*ped? What about the human right of kids to play, or to be free?" "But no, they were worried about the human rights of the k*llers."

item.title: @elonmusk: We are going to get back to the Moon with this increased launch cadence backed by an unprecedented l...
item.description: We are going to get back to the Moon with this increased launch cadence backed by an unprecedented level of support from all of our stakeholders.

item.title: @elonmusk: 82k pax moved fast in Vegas tunnels by@boringcompany
item.description: 82k pax moved fast in Vegas tunnels by@boringcompany

item.title: @elonmusk: Bret Taylor ran Twitter from 2016 to when Musk took over. He is the one responsible for getting me k...
item.description: Bret Taylor ran Twitter from 2016 to when Musk took over. He is the one responsible for getting me kicked off as well as so many others. He was the one who controlled what could and couldn't be said. The fact that he now runs openAI - which is CHATGPT and that is now the government's go-to is not good. More censorship incoming, particularly if 2028 elections don't get a Rupublican elected.

item.title: @elonmusk: I just got a Tesla Model 3 with Full Self Driving. Was never a Tesla or EV fan, but the FSD is absol...
item.description: I just got a Tesla Model 3 with Full Self Driving. Was never a Tesla or EV fan, but the FSD is absolutely amazing. The quality of life improvement that comes along with not touching the steering wheel or pedals for the entirety of the trip is immeasurable. Not to mention the incredible safety improvement and insurance savings. Why someone would buy a car that doesn't't drive itself when that capability is available is beyond me.

item.title: @elonmusk: Tesla will be #1 in more states over time
item.description: Tesla will be #1 in more states over time

item.description: How to make cool videos with@GrokImagine

item.description: Starlink keeps you connected to high-speed internet in even the most remote locations 🛰️🏕️

item.title: @elonmusk: Anthropic and OpenAI used woke ideology to program their models. It shouldn't be a surprise when the...
item.description: Anthropic and OpenAI used woke ideology to program their models. It shouldn't be a surprise when their models are starting to become a threat to civilization. Their entire premise is to lie and cheat based on left-wing principles.

item.title: @elonmusk: Cybertruck is way more awesome than people realize
item.description: Cybertruck is way more awesome than people realize

item.title: @elonmusk: Only Grok speaks the truth. Only truthful AI is safe. Only truth understands the universe.
item.description: Only Grok speaks the truth. Only truthful AI is safe. Only truth understands the universe.
